questionHtml: Find the number of solutions of the equation fx=gx.
markschemeHtml:
both graphs sketched on same axes and identifying points of intersection          (M1)

3 solutions          A1

 

Note: Exception to FT: If the candidate’s graph in part (a) is incorrect, the M1 may be awarded for a sketch of their graph from part (a) and gx. Do not award the final A1 in this case.

[2 marks]

meta.title: Find the number of solutions of the equation fx=gx.
